meaning: n.教唆犯(尤指教唆儿童犯罪的人),老坏蛋
examples: Nancy was the re, too, and Fagin glanced at her uneasily.
Fagin took hold of the Dodger's collar and shook him violently.
Bill Sikes was sitting by his fire with his dog when Fagin entered.
The transitions are seamless and Michael Fagin's handsome sets slip in and out without fuss.
The villain of the piece is a Fagin named Wes (Egon Di Mateo).
